Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514, Judge: Wallace P. Douglass, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiffs Wongful Death Heir and as Successor in Interest to Robert Chartier, deceased.
Plaintiff Paula Chartier present in pro per as Wrongful Death Heir and Kimberly Chartier present in pro per as Legal Heir.
Parties were sworn and testify.
After hearing the testimony and considered the evidence both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, the Court ordered for distribution of all net settlements funds derived from the personal injury - survival and wrongful death cause of action as following proportions:
Paula Chartier 40%
Kimberly Chartier 20%.
Estate of Robert Chartier 40%
Attorneys' Fee and Costs $2,070.80
Order was submitted to and signed by the Court. (See scanned doc. for the details of Order)

MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Appoint Paula Chartier As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James P. Nevin, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Robert Chartier and Paula Chartier

RULING:
Plaintiff's motion to appoint Paula Chartier as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for Robert Chartier, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to appoint Paula Chartier as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for Robert Chartier, deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is granted.
